title: nagelia denticulata var. psilantha
intro: Nagelia denticulata var. psilantha, also known as Nagelia or Black-eyed Susan, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa, characterized by its vibrant yellow and black flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Nagelia denticulata var. psilantha include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Nagelia denticulata var. psilantha is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture by infusing the flowers in hot water or a solvent, such as ethanol or glycerin, to extract its medicinal compounds.
